pi.title_zh: 实验室负责人 / 教授
pi.bio_zh: 黄青青教授长期从事林业装备智能化与天空地一体化资源管理研究，在林业机械设计及遥感技术应用等领域取得重要成果，主持和参与多项国家级、省部级科研项目。
pi.bio_en: Prof. Qingqing Huang has long been engaged in research on intelligent forestry equipment and sky-ground integrated resource management. She has achieved important results in forestry machinery design and remote sensing applications, and has led and participated in multiple national and provincial research projects.
